title: It's a Town Full of Things I Love, So Yeah…
overview: Fuu and Kao-chan meet two new friends when they stop in to the camera shop to check up on repairs for Fuu's camera.

title: It's a Teeny Light Blue Ticket, So Yeah…
overview: Fuu gets excited when she receives a ticket from her favorite photographer, Riho Shihomi.

title: If We All Walk Together, We'll Be Happy, So Yeah...
overview: After finding one of Kou’s childhood drawings, Fuu and her friends think it may be the same as her favorite picture of her father. They set out to discover the location with Sayomi's help.

title: It Was On That One Day, So Yeah...
